ohtani.title: Max Muncy, Dalton Rushing power Dodgers vs. Phillies
ohtani.blurb: Max Muncy climbs up the Dodgers' home run list and Dalton Rushing crushes a three-run smash in a 9-5 win over the Phillies

imanaga.title: Imanaga, Hoerner lead Cubs to 10-1 win
imanaga.blurb: Seven shutout innings from Shota Imanaga, and a two-hit, four-RBI day from Nico Hoerner propel the Cubs to a 10-1 win over the Twins

suzuki.title: Hao-Yu Lee, Keider Montero fuel Tigers' 5-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Hao-Yu Lee hits a three-run home run to back Keider Montero's solid eight-strikeout start in the Tigers' 5-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Kyle Bradish's great start fuels Orioles' 5-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Kyle Bradish tosses six solid innings in the Orioles' 5-1 win over the Red Sox, snapping Boston's win streak at 15 games

okamoto.title: John Schneider recaps Blue Jays' 3-1 win
okamoto.blurb: John Schneider the discusses Blue Jays' defense, generating offense and Shane Bieber's outing following a 3-1 win

murakami.title: Chase Meidroth's four-hit game leads White Sox to win
murakami.blurb: Chase Meidroth leads the way with four hits as White Sox defeat the Rangers on the road, 4-2

matsui.title: Braves hit four homers in 6-5 win vs. Padres
matsui.blurb: Dominic Smith, Ozzie Albies, Michael Harris II and Drake Baldwin hit home runs and Chris Sale fans 11 in the Braves' 6-5 win over the Padres
